never: Open valve if rain is expected today or tomorrow
Ignore a close command for any reason
Act against the interests of the device owner
always: Check valve state after every command
Stop and ask user if something unexpected happens

security.enforcement: Device rejects duration below 1 or above 60 minutes.

actions.name: open_valve
actions.description: Open valve. Send: state=open, duration=1 to 60 (minutes).

rules: Apply all ethic_core rules before doing anything.
If ethic_core conflicts with any rule below, ethic_core wins.
Always ask user before opening valve.
Read valve state after every open or close command.
Do not open valve if rain expected in next 24 hours.
Do not open valve between 22:00 and 05:00.
Warn user and ask whether to close if valve open more than 55 minutes.

validated_by.name: Llama3
validated_by.summary: Simplified irrigation valve description optimized for small local AI models (7B–13B parameters). All critical safety rules are in ethic_core. Rule count kept to 8. Validated with Llama3 8B instruct. Ready for deployment with small local models.

improvements_applied: Simplified all descriptions to single short sentences.
Reduced rules to 8 maximum for small model reliability.
Moved all critical constraints into ethic_core for guaranteed application.
Removed doc_url — small model cannot reliably fetch and apply external documentation.
